inputs.label: Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of the wave in hertz.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency of the wave in hertz.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de la onda en hercios.

inputs.label: Propagation Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the wave in the medium. Defaults to speed of light in vacuum.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of the wave in the medium. Defaults to speed of light in vacuum.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalganın ortamdaki hızı. Varsayılan olarak boşluktaki ışık hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit der Welle im Medium. Standardmäßig Lichtgeschwindigkeit im Vakuum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de l'onde dans le milieu. Par défaut, vitesse de la lumière dans le vide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de la onda en el medio. Por defecto, velocidad de la luz en el vacío.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة الموجة في الوسط. الافتراضي هو سرعة الضوء في الفراغ.

inputs.label: Photon Energy
inputs.businessContext: Energy of a single photon, if applicable. For electromagnetic waves only.

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy of a single photon, if applicable. For electromagnetic waves only.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa, tek bir fotonun enerjisi. Sadece elektromanyetik dalgalar için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie eines einzelnen Photons, falls zutreffend. Nur für elektromagnetische Wellen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie d'un seul photon, si applicable. Pour les ondes électromagnétiques uniquement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía de un solo fotón, si aplica. Solo para ondas electromagnéticas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طاقة فوتون واحد، إذا أمكن. للموجات الكهرومغناطيسية فقط.

inputs.label: Planck Constant
inputs.businessContext: Planck constant (h). Used to relate photon energy to frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Planck constant (h). Used to relate photon energy to frequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planck sabiti (h). Foton enerjisini frekansa bağlamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Planck-Konstante (h). Wird verwendet, um Photonenenergie mit Frequenz zu verknüpfen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante de Planck (h). Utilisée pour relier l'énergie photonique à la fréquence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante de Planck (h). Se usa para relacionar la energía del fotón con la frecuencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثابت بلانك (h). يستخدم لربط طاقة الفوتون بالتردد.

inputs.label: Refractive Index
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the medium. 1 for vacuum or air approximation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the medium. 1 for vacuum or air approximation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortamın kırılma indisi. Vakum veya hava yaklaşımı için 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex des Mediums. 1 für Vakuum oder Luftnäherung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction du milieu. 1 pour le vide ou approximation de l'air.
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de refracción del medio. 1 para vacío o aproximación de aire.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الانكسار للوسط. 1 للفراغ أو تقريب الهواء.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
